channel.title: Thoughts on the crafting of software
channel.description: Commentary on methods and tools for developing and maintaining software systems. By Kieran Potts.

item.title: Should we rebrand REST?
item.description: In this blog post I argue the case for consigning the term REST API to history. In its place we should adopt the terms HTTP API and hypermedia API.

item.title: Should we rebrand JavaScript?
item.description: There are several problems with the JavaScript name. Is it time to rebrand JavaScript? If so, what should we call it?

item.title: Hello, world
item.description: Welcome to my new blog. I will use this space to explore the history of software engineering, analyze the current state of the industry and try to predict its future trajectory.
